body_txt: One generation back there was a Love Triangle . Now the losing party meets note "Meets" is an important component, since usually it's a sudden development for which the character is not prepared. — and has to interact with — the child of the other two. This causes emotional chaos . The character loses the ability to act calmly (or even adequately) whenever a situation arises related to the kid. The effect is greater when the loser is an otherwise calm, Magnificent Bastard or flawless hero proven Not So Stoic and Not So Above It All . If the progeny is of the opposite sex and resembles the contested person too much — often the case — it's even worse. Expect a Wrong-Name Outburst . Not only is it a reminder, one sees the image of the lost love, their would-be kid, an image of the rival, or a second chance, and so on — often two or more of these at once. Usually female kid and male ex-rival. Compare Affair? Blame the Bastard and Jealous Romantic Witness .
